title: Agent Experience (AX) - Getting Started Guide
author: AX OSS contributors (Netlify-founded community)
content_summary: Methodology guide for adopting Agent Experience principles in an organization. Three-phase approach: assessment, planning, implementation. Operated by an OSS contributor community originally convened by Netlify. Broader/parallel to but distinct from Kun Chen's AXI technical framework.
key_points: AX = holistic experience AI agents have with a product/platform
Parallel concept to UX and DX
Netlify is the foundational convener; positioned as community-driven
No concrete CLI vs MCP technical guidance on this page
